title: paspalum turriforme
intro: Paspalum turriforme, also known as Elephant's tooth, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Paspalum turriforme include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of fever. Herbal preparations of Paspalum turriforme are typically made by infusing its leaves and roots in water or by extracting its active compounds using solvents, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or capsules.
